landing.pill: Fast tools for media and development
landing.description: Fast and modern tools for converting images, videos, audio, files, and data directly in your browser.
landing.processingInBrowser: Processing directly in browser, without upload.
landing.optimizedConversions: Optimized conversions for every file type.
landing.fileStorage: Files are stored on your device, never uploaded.
landing.videoDesc: Convert and compress videos directly in your browser in seconds.
landing.imagesDesc: Transform and optimize images between different formats quickly.
landing.shieldDesc: Decode and analyze JWT tokens in real-time without external tools.
